ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "rnd_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on research and development */,
  "administration_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on administration */,
  "marketing_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on marketing */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the expenditures were incurred */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the business (e.g., Industrials, Technology) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was recorded */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year to which the expenditure belongs */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated in the state and category */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit after subtracting all expenditures */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who recorded the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source system from which the data was integrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing analysis record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data record */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment calculated from the expenditures */,
  "campaign_success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of marketing campaigns in percentage */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis conducted */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., digital, traditional) */,
  "customer_acquisition_cost" REAL /* Cost to acquire a new customer */,
  "customer_lifetime_value" REAL /* Estimated lifetime value of a customer */,
  "executive_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the analysis for executives */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who conducted the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES financial_data ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each record
Amount spent on research and development
Amount spent on administration
Amount spent on marketing
State where the expenditures were incurred
Category of the business (e.g., Industrials, Technology)
Date when the expenditure was recorded
